name: scbkr-desktop
description: SCBKR Local Responsibility Model desktop release candidate

scripts.dev: echo "P14-B skeleton only: run apps/web and apps/api separately, then use Tauri dev in a Rust-enabled environment."
scripts.check:skeleton: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); ['src-tauri/tauri.conf.json','src-tauri/Cargo.toml','src-tauri/src/main.rs','src/App.tsx'].forEach(p=>{if(!fs.existsSync(p)) throw new Error(p+' missing')}); console.log('desktop skeleton ok')"
scripts.check:release: npm run check:skeleton && node -e "const p=require('./package.json'); if(p.name!=='scbkr-desktop') throw new Error('desktop package name must be release candidate'); console.log('desktop release ok')"
